name: Terraform & Infrastructure as Code (HCL)
description: Terraform 基础设施即代码:HCL 模块、状态与变更管理

detector.inline: profile.code_domains.some(d=>['terraform','iac','infrastructure','hcl'].includes(d)) || profile.repo_signals.some(s=>/\b(terraform|\.tf |hcl|terraform state|terraform plan|terraform apply|tfstate|infrastructure as code|terraform module|provider block)\b/i.test(s)) ? 0.9 : 0
